final:
module RefModule(
    input CLK,
    input D,
    input SET,
    output reg Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt)
begin
    if (SET == 1)   // Asynchronous set
        Q <= 1;
    else            // Synchronous update
        Q <= D;
end

endmodule
